hero.title: Inhabiting the tropics, quietly.
hero.subtitle: Residential and commercial design based in Dominical, Costa Rica. The work starts from the site itself: the slope, the shade, the wind, the local trades. Each project tries to settle in before it stands out.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: Houses, interventions and spaces designed for the South Pacific climate.

about.title: The studio
about.body: Independent practice based in Dominical, on the South Pacific coast of Costa Rica. Two decades of work between coast and cordillera, on projects where the climate leads and materials are chosen by how they age. I follow each commission from the first sketch to handover — few projects a year, closely watched, built with local craftspeople.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: End to end. The eye doesn't get outsourced.

design.title: Architectural design
design.description: Concept, construction drawings and specs for new residential and commercial work in tropical climate.

renovation.title: Renovation
renovation.description: Interventions in existing buildings — additions, reorganization and upgrades.

construction.title: Construction supervision
construction.description: On-site oversight to hold quality, schedule and coherence between drawings and the built thing.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Site reading, project feasibility, municipal permits and expert reports.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project — I answer personally.
